name: enhancement-hooks-plan
question: What enhancements will the domain need?
decision: models: TenantMember.isBillingAdmin computed view. collections: tenantMemberCollection.findByTenant(id), workspaceCollection.findByTenant(id). rootStore: none needed.
rationale: Full domain implementation in packages/state-api with domain() API. Export TeamsMultiTenancyDomain scope and teamsMultiTenancyDomain result. CollectionPersistable auto-composed.
